response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, secure coding per IEC 62443, or cloud-native industrial platform design — core requirements for this role. Their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 2014-2015 role at National Instruments, insufficient to meet the 8–12 year C++ expertise requirement.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse domains and technologies
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead, mentor, and document complex systems
concerns: Minimal recent or demonstrable C++/STL/OO development in industrial contexts
No evidence of experience with message brokers, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Lacks documented exposure to IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial cybersecurity practices
